property.name: java.library.path
property.value: F:\java-17\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;E:\ZenTaoPMS\ZenTao\zbox\nssm\win64;C:\Windows\System32\HWAudioDriver;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;E:\mingw64\bin;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Users\火狐\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\;sers\火狐\.dotnet\tools;C:\;sers\火狐\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;%Sy;temRoot%\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Server 8.0\bin;D:\git\Git\cmd;D:\apache-maven-3.9.15-bin\apache-maven-3.9.15\bin;C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\resources\bin;C:\Users\火狐\.local\bin;C:\Program Files (x86)\Java\jdk1.6.0_30\bin;D:\Node.js\;C:\Users\火狐\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Launcher\;d:\cursor\cursor\resources\app\codeBin;C:\Users\火狐\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\火狐\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\火狐\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;E:\QT\Tools\mingw1310_64\bin;E:\QT\6.9.2\mingw_64;E:\cmake\cmake-4.1.1-windows-x86_64\bin;E:\QT\6.9.2\mingw_64\bin;E:\QTtext\git\Git\bin;E:\mingw64\bin;F:\PyCharm 2025.2.3\bin;C:\Users\火狐\AppData\Local\Python\bin;C:\Users\火狐\AppData\Roaming\npm;D:\IntelliJ IDEA Community Edition 2025.2.6.1\bin;C:\Users\火狐\AppData\Local\Programs\Ollama;.

testcase.name: pingReturnsDatabaseTimestamp
testcase.system-out:
09:25:55.400 [main] INFO org.springframework.test.context.support.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils -- Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.laborlaw.ragkbdemo.controller.DbPingControllerTest]: DbPingControllerTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 09:25:55.686 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.laborlaw.ragkbdemo.RagKbDemoApplication for test class com.laborlaw.ragkbdemo.controller.DbPingControllerTest

:: Spring Boot :: (v3.5.3)

Please check your configuration. 2026-07-20T09:26:00.447+08:00 INFO 11632 --- [rag-kb-demo] [ main] o.s.b.t.m.w.SpringBootMockServletContext : Initializing Spring TestDispatcherServlet '' 2026-07-20T09:26:00.449+08:00 INFO 11632 --- [rag-kb-demo] [ main] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Initializing Servlet '' 2026-07-20T09:26:00.461+08:00 INFO 11632 --- [rag-kb-demo] [ main] o.s.t.web.servlet.TestDispatcherServlet : Completed initialization in 7 ms 2026-07-20T09:26:00.799+08:00 INFO 11632 --- [rag-kb-demo] [ main] c.l.r.controller.DbPingControllerTest : Started DbPingControllerTest in 4.999 seconds (process running for 6.914)
